issue.title: @gitclaw /prompt pack e2e 20260531T074748Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /prompt pack @file:docs/search-fixture.md:1-1

Live prompt-pack E2E.
Use the repo-reader skill and search for prompt pack unique search fixture phrase, but the deterministic prompt pack report must stay body-free.
Do not include this hidden issue token: GITCLAW_PROMPT_PACK_HIDDEN_20260531T074748Z
issue.author: AnandChowdhary
